levels.name: Carefree
levels.what_it_means: The system makes the right action easy and mistakes structurally hard. Careless implementors succeed.

levels.name: Prevention
levels.what_it_means: Mistakes cannot propagate past the originator. Careless work is safe within well-defined scopes.

levels.name: Deterministic
levels.what_it_means: Known worries are reliably caught. Careless work is safe for covered cases; uncovered boundaries require attention.

levels.name: Probabilistic
levels.what_it_means: Errors are sometimes caught. Careless work sometimes passes unnoticed.

levels.name: Vigilance
levels.what_it_means: Errors are caught only when someone is paying close attention. Careless work is never safe.

levels.name: Hope
levels.what_it_means: No mechanism exists. Errors propagate undetected.
